meta.note: Quotes, news, earnings & analyst trends are live (Finnhub). Technicals are derived from live price/returns; options chains, IV and flow are modeled (no free options data).

news.headline: As Social Security faces trust fund depletion, some Washington lawmakers call for taxing high earners
news.summary: High earners may only contribute Social Security payroll taxes for part of the year. As the program faces funding woes, some lawmakers say that should change.

news.headline: FIFA gives green light for rainbow flags at Egypt v Iran World Cup clash - Reuters
news.summary: FIFA gives green light for rainbow flags at Egypt v Iran World Cup clash  Reuters

news.headline: Apple stock gets slammed on bigger Mac, iPad price hikes. Why it can weather the storm
news.summary: The stock had its worst session in more than a year as management made its first official move to pass higher memory costs onto consumers.

news.headline: UN pauses Hormuz evacuation plan after ship reports attack - Reuters
news.summary: UN pauses Hormuz evacuation plan after ship reports attack  Reuters

news.headline: Crude shipments through Hormuz at highest since Iran war began - Reuters
news.summary: Crude shipments through Hormuz at highest since Iran war began  Reuters

news.headline: Obesity drugs approach a major milestone, and Lilly may have a 'game changer' ahead
news.summary: Every weekday, the Investing Club releases the Homestretch; an actionable afternoon update just in time for the last hour of trading.

news.headline: Apple raises iPad and MacBook prices, blaming cost of chips amid AI boom
news.summary: Company says it cannot shield customers from memory and storage chip costs – and iPhone hikes could be next

news.headline: I'd Buy More of This Growth Stock Before the Market Figures Out What It's Missing
news.summary: The market doesn't fully appreciate this emerging AI stock.

keyLevels.note: Leading the tape at $716.38 — key for risk appetite
Pivot $734.30 — bulls want to hold above

gamePlan: Bias into tomorrow: Neutral — watch only — wait for confirmation.
Signals are conflicted — let the first 30 minutes set the tone before committing risk.
Use QQQ $716.38 as the risk-on/off line; trade with it, not against it.
Primary idea: NVDA PUT — enter $8.16–$9.02, target $12.88+, stop $5.15.
Keep total options exposure modest; one A+ setup beats five marginal ones.
report.narrative: Stocks closed higher with SPY +0.14% and QQQ +0.81%. Composite sentiment +0 (Neutral). The tape is being driven mainly by market breadth (a/d), qqq / mega-cap tech, sector rotation. VIX at 14.06 (-1.88%). Environment read: watch only — wait for confirmation. Leadership came from Healthcare; Technology lagged. Today's standouts: AMD +2.47%, LLY +0.93%. Laggards: AAPL -6.12%, PLTR -5.49%. Carrying NVDA as the top idea into tomorrow (7.1/10).
report.riskWarning: Options trading is risky and can result in the loss of the entire premium paid. This report provides analysis and educational information only — not financial advice. Size positions small (1–2% of capital per idea), honor stops, and do your own research.
